data.title: SOL Holds $140 Support as Upbit Hack Fails to Shake Solana Ecosystem
data.description:
Solana (SOL) is showing remarkable resilience this week, holding firmly above the critical $140 support zone despite heightened market anxiety following a $37 million hack on South Korea’s Upbit exchange. Related Reading: The Bull And Bear Scenario For XRP That Could Play Out In November The stability comes at a time when institutional interest in Solana is accelerating, highlighted by Franklin Templeton’s recent Form 8-A filing with the U. S. SEC to launch a Solana ETF
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/sol-holds-140-support-as-upbit-hack-fails-to-shake-solana-ecosystem/

Sentiment, however, still sits in fear territory even after the bounce, indicating that positioning remains defensive and that confidence in a floor is […]

data.title: Ethereum Raises Gas Limit to 60M, Unlocking Biggest Capacity in Years
data.description:
Ethereum has raised its block gas limit to a four-year high of 60 million, significantly boosting base-layer capacity as validators unite to increase throughput.

The post Ethereum Raises Gas Limit to 60M, Unlocking Biggest Capacity in Years first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/11/27/ethereum-raises-gas-limit-to-60-m/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ethereum-raises-gas-limit-to-60-m
